name: David Wong

cv_text: David Wong. Year 4 BBA Finance, HKU. CGPA 3.6. British national. President of HKU Finance Society — led team of 30, organised annual finance forum with 500 attendees. Regional Finalist CFA Institute Research Challenge 2025. Summer intern at Goldman Sachs HK Investment Banking Division 2025. Mentor in HKU Business School Mentorship Programme. Two-time Dean's List. HKU Business School Academic Excellence Award 2024-25. Skills: financial modelling, Bloomberg Terminal, Python for finance, Excel, PowerPoint. Seeking postgraduate opportunities at HKU or graduate scheme in finance and consulting.
